name: PM-SYM
target_description: Unorganised workers aged 18-40 with monthly income up to ₹15,000
data_source: PM-SYM Brief from Ministry of Labour and Employment official document

rules.description: Applicant must be between 18 and 40 years of age
Monthly income must be up to ₹15,000 (₹1,80,000 annually)
rules.ambiguity_note: Monthly income up to ₹15,000 (₹1,80,000 annually). AMB-25: income verification difficult for informal workers.

rules.description: Applicant must not be a member of EPF/NPS/ESIC
Applicant must not be an income tax payer
Applicant must have Aadhaar linked to bank account

required_documents.document: Savings Bank or Jan Dhan Account with IFSC

benefit_summary: ₹3,000/month guaranteed pension after age 60. 50:50 govt-worker contribution. Contribution ₹55-₹200/month based on entry age. Spouse gets 50% family pension.

application_offices.find_instruction: Find the nearest CSC at locator.csccloud.in

description: Monthly pension of ₹3,000 at age 60 for unorganised sector workers with monthly income ≤₹15,000. The worker and government each contribute 50% of the monthly premium (₹55–₹200 depending on age of entry). If the subscriber dies before 60, the spouse can continue or withdraw. Simple enrollment at CSC or bank using Aadhaar and savings account.
description_hindi: असंगठित क्षेत्र के मजदूर (मासिक आय ≤₹15,000) को 60 वर्ष के बाद ₹3,000/माह पेंशन। सरकार आपके जितना योगदान स्वयं देती है — बराबर-बराबर। मासिक किस्त उम्र के हिसाब से ₹55–₹200। अगर 60 से पहले मृत्यु हो तो जीवनसाथी योजना जारी रख सकते हैं या पैसा निकाल सकते हैं।
benefit_summary_hindi: ₹3,000/माह पेंशन, 60 वर्ष के बाद, सरकार 50% किस्त भरती है
